# CWE-549 negative: password omitted from API response (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-549-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func PreviewSignup(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	if email == "" {
		http.Error(w, "email required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_ = r.FormValue("password")
	w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"email": email})
}
